ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the package */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Maintainer of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the package release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that the import belongs to */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., functions, methods, classes) */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace where the import is used */,
  "imported_as" TEXT /* Name under which the import is used in the namespace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import method */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import that the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the method (including parameters and return type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_methods_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import class */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import that the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_parents" TEXT /* Names of the parent classes of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_classes_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is leading the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_packages" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package used in the project */,
  "version_used" TEXT /* Version of the package used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is working on */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness_scores" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the heaviness score was last calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required package */,
  "version_required" TEXT /* Version of the required package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "required_package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_tags" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "tag")
)
